# BTCPay Server

> Accept Bitcoin payments. Free, open-source & self-hosted Bitcoin payment processor.

## Project Overview

BTCPay Server is a self-hosted, free, open-source cryptocurrency payment processor. It allows merchants and individuals to accept Bitcoin (on-chain and Lightning Network) and altcoin payments without fees or intermediaries. Built on ASP.NET Core (C# / .NET 10).

## Architecture

BTCPay Server is an ASP.NET Core web application using Blazor for server-side rendering with MVC fallback views.

### Solution Structure (btcpayserver.sln)

| Project | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `BTCPayServer` | Main web application (UI, controllers, services, plugins) |
| `BTCPayServer.Abstractions` | Shared interfaces and contracts |
| `BTCPayServer.Common` | Common utilities and shared logic |
| `BTCPayServer.Data` | Data access layer (EF Core, migrations) |
| `BTCPayServer.Client` | Client library for Greenfield API |
| `BTCPayServer.Rating` | Exchange rate fetching and conversion |
| `BTCPayServer.Tests` | Test suite |
| `BTCPayServer.PluginPacker` | Plugin packaging utilities |

### Key Directories

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `BTCPayServer/Controllers/` | MVC controllers (UI-prefixed) and Greenfield REST API |
| `BTCPayServer/Services/` | Core business logic (invoices, wallets, payments, stores) |
| `BTCPayServer/HostedServices/` | Background services (invoice watching, rate tracking, payouts) |
| `BTCPayServer/Plugins/` | Plugin system (Altcoins, Lightning, Apps, Point of Sale, etc.) |
| `BTCPayServer/Configuration/` | App settings and configuration loading |
| `BTCPayServer/Views/` | Razor views |
| `BTCPayServer/Blazor/` | Blazor components |
| `BTCPayServer/Components/` | Shared UI components |
| `docs/` | Development docs (Greenfield API, authorization) |
| `Build/` | Build scripts and shared MSBuild props |

### Plugin System

BTCPay Server uses a plugin architecture for extensibility. Plugins are in `BTCPayServer/Plugins/`:

- **Altcoins**: BGold, Dash, Dogecoin, Groestlcoin, Litecoin, Monacoin, Liquid (Elements)
- **Bitcoin**: Core Bitcoin/Lightning payment processing
- **Apps**: Crowdfund, Point of Sale, Payment Requests
- **Store integrations**: Shopify
- **Infrastructure**: Email, Forms, NFC, Monetization, Webhooks, Subscriptions, Pull Payments

### Greenfield API (REST)

RESTful API under `Controllers/GreenField/`. Endpoints include:
- Invoice management, Store management, User management
- Lightning node info, Payment methods, Wallets
- Payment requests, Payout processors, Notifications
- API keys, Server roles, Reports

Documented at: https://docs.btcpayserver.org/API/Greenfield/v1/

### Background Services

Key hosted services in `BTCPayServer/HostedServices/`:
- `InvoiceWatcher` — monitors invoice status changes
- `PendingTransactionService` — tracks unconfirmed transactions
- `RatesHostedService` — fetches exchange rates periodically
- `PullPaymentHostedService` — processes pull payments
- `NBXplorerWaiter` — waits for NBXplorer (Bitcoin indexer) readiness
- `PluginUpdateFetcher` — checks for plugin updates

### Key Dependencies

- **NBitcoin** (9.x) — Bitcoin protocol implementation
- **BTCPayServer.Lightning.All** — Lightning Network client (LND, c-lightning, Eclair, CLN)
- **NBXplorer** — Bitcoin full-node indexer (separate process)
- **LNURL** — Lightning URL protocol support
- **MailKit** — Email sending
- **Fido2** — WebAuthn/FIDO2 two-factor authentication
- **Serilog** — Structured logging
- **TwentyTwenty.Storage** — Multi-provider file storage (Amazon S3, Azure Blob, Google Cloud, local)

## Building and Running

```bash
# Using Docker (recommended)
docker run -d --name btcpay \
  -v "btcpay_data:/data" \
  -p 49392:49392 \
  btcpayserver/btcpayserver:latest

# From source
git clone https://github.com/btcpayserver/btcpayserver.git
cd btcpayserver
dotnet build
dotnet run --project BTCPayServer
```

Requires NBXplorer running for full Bitcoin functionality.

## Testing

```bash
dotnet test
```

Test project: `BTCPayServer.Tests`

## Contributing

- PRs welcome (see badge in README)
- Development docs: `docs/greenfield-development.md`, `docs/greenfield-authorization.md`
- Community chat: https://chat.btcpayserver.org/
- Security: security@btcpayserver.org or https://huntr.dev/repos/btcpayserver/btcpayserver/

## Code Style

- C# with standard .NET conventions
- Uses `.editorconfig` for formatting rules
- JetBrains annotations for code analysis
- `.coderabbit.yaml` for AI code review configuration

## Important Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `Program.cs` | Application entry point and host setup |
| `Dockerfile` | Multi-stage Docker build |
| `docker-entrypoint.sh` | Docker container startup script |
| `btcpayserver.sln` | Solution file |
| `SECURITY.md` | Vulnerability disclosure policy |
| `RELEASE-CHECKLIST.md` | Release process checklist |
| `RELEASE-CYCLES.md` | Release cycle documentation |
